articles.original_title: Trump cancels envoys' trip to Pakistan, hopes fade for breakthrough in Iran war

A2.title: US Trip to Pakistan Cancelled
A2.body: US envoys will not go to Pakistan. They wanted to talk about Iran. Iran does not want to agree. The US wants big changes. Iran says no. This is a problem.

B1.title: US Trip to Pakistan Cancelled
B1.body: A trip to Pakistan by US envoys was cancelled. This happened after Iran said it would not accept some demands. An Iranian source in Islamabad gave this information to Reuters. The Iranian side will not agree to maximalist demands. This news is important because it affects talks about the Iran war. The US and Iran have been discussing a possible breakthrough. Now, hopes for this are fading. The situation is still uncertain. The US and Iran are still talking, but it is not clear what will happen next. The trip was cancelled recently, and this has caused concerns about the future.

B2.title: US Envoy Trip Cancelled
B2.body: A recent development has led to the cancellation of a trip by US envoys to Pakistan, sparking concerns about a potential breakthrough in the Iran conflict. According to an Iranian diplomatic source in Islamabad, the Iranian side is unwilling to accept maximalist demands, which has resulted in a stalemate. The situation has been further complicated by the involvement of multiple parties, making it challenging to reach a mutually beneficial agreement. The cancellation of the trip has significant implications, as it may hinder efforts to resolve the ongoing tensions between the US and Iran. The Iranian source, speaking to Reuters, emphasized that the Iranian side will not compromise on certain issues, leading to a sense of uncertainty about the future of the conflict. This development has raised questions about the ability of the parties involved to find common ground and work towards a peaceful resolution. The situation remains complex and delicate, with no clear solution in sight.

C1.title: Diplomatic Efforts Stall
C1.body: A recent development has ostensibly thwarted attempts at reconciliation, as a trip to Pakistan by envoys has been cancelled, thereby diminishing prospects for a breakthrough in the Iran conflict. According to an Iranian diplomatic source in Islamabad, the Iranian side is purportedly unwilling to acquiesce to maximalist demands, which have been a major stumbling block in negotiations. This impasse has significant implications, as it suggests that a resolution to the conflict may be more elusive than initially anticipated. The cancellation of the trip is likely to exacerbate tensions, and it remains to be seen how this will impact the trajectory of the conflict. The Iranian diplomatic source, speaking to Reuters, underscored the importance of finding a mutually acceptable solution, emphasizing that the Iranian side will not compromise on certain fundamental principles. As the situation continues to unfold, it is becoming increasingly evident that a peaceful resolution will require a concerted effort from all parties involved. The maximalist demands have been a point of contention, and it is unclear whether a compromise can be reached. The diplomatic community is closely watching the situation, and the outcome is likely to have far-reaching consequences.

articles.original_title: Watch: Iowa State coach Jimmy Rogers shares takeaways from spring game

A2.title: Iowa State Spring Game
A2.body: Iowa State played a game. The offense won 20-14. It was on Saturday. The team is happy. They learned new things. The game was fun.

B1.title: Iowa State Spring Game
B1.body: Iowa State's offense beat the defense 20-14 in Saturday's spring game. The game was a showcase for the team. Coach Jimmy Rogers shared his thoughts after the game. He talked about what the team did well and what they need to work on. The offense played well, scoring 20 points. The defense had some struggles, giving up 20 points. The game was an important test for the team. It helped the coaches see what the players can do. The team will use this information to get better. They will work on their mistakes and try to improve. The game was on Saturday and it was a good experience for the team.

B2.title: Iowa State Spring Game Highlights
B2.body: Iowa State's offense came out on top in their spring game, beating the defense 20-14. The showcase took place on Saturday, giving fans a glimpse into the team's progress. Coach Jimmy Rogers shared his thoughts on the game, highlighting key areas for improvement. The offense performed well, but the defense struggled at times. Despite this, the team is optimistic about the upcoming season. The spring game is an important part of the team's preparation, allowing them to test new strategies and player combinations. Coach Rogers' feedback will be crucial in helping the team to refine their skills and work towards a successful season. The team's performance has sparked excitement among fans, who are eagerly anticipating the new season. Overall, the spring game was a valuable learning experience for Iowa State.

C1.title: Iowa State Spring Game Recap
C1.body: In a captivating spectacle, Iowa State's offense emerged victorious, outmaneuvering the defense with a score of 20-14 in the highly anticipated spring game on Saturday. This exhibition match served as a pivotal platform for the team to gauge their prowess and identify areas that necessitate improvement. Coach Jimmy Rogers, in a post-game interview, shared his astute observations and takeaways from the event, providing invaluable insights into the team's performance. The spring game, a seminal event in the college football calendar, drew a considerable crowd, all of whom were eager to witness the team's progress and potential. As the season draws near, the team's adeptness and strategic prowess will undoubtedly be subject to intense scrutiny. The outcome of this game has significant implications, as it underscores the team's readiness to tackle the challenges that lie ahead. With this exhibition match, Iowa State has set the tone for a promising season, and fans are eagerly anticipating the team's future performances. The team's offensive strategy and defensive vulnerabilities were on full display, offering a glimpse into their strengths and weaknesses.

articles.original_title: University of Arizona's College of Information Science adds AI emphasis to undergraduate degree, launches minor in AI and society

A2.title: Arizona University Adds AI
A2.body: The University of Arizona starts a new AI program. It begins in Fall 2026. Students learn AI and ethics. They work on real projects. This helps them understand AI and society. The program is new and important.

B1.title: Arizona University Adds AI Course
B1.body: The University of Arizona's College of Information Science is starting a new AI course. It will begin in Fall 2026 and will be part of the undergraduate degree. The course will teach technical skills and ethics. Students will work on real projects that affect society. This will help them understand the impact of AI. The university wants to prepare students for the future. They will learn about AI and how it affects people. The course is important because AI is becoming more common. Students will gain valuable skills and knowledge. The university is excited to offer this new course to its students. It will start soon.

B2.title: Arizona University Adds AI Focus
B2.body: The University of Arizona's College of Information Science is introducing an AI emphasis to its undergraduate degree, starting in Fall 2026. This new approach will combine technical skills with the study of ethics and societal impact. As part of this initiative, students will work on real-world projects through the AI Core program, gaining hands-on experience. The college is also launching a minor in AI and society, which will allow students to explore the broader implications of AI on modern life. By incorporating AI into its curriculum, the university aims to equip students with the skills and knowledge needed to navigate the rapidly evolving tech landscape. This move is expected to benefit students and the wider community, as AI continues to shape various aspects of society. The university's decision reflects its commitment to staying at the forefront of technological advancements, preparing students for successful careers in AI and related fields, and fostering a deeper understanding of AI's role in society, ultimately enhancing its undergraduate program.

C1.title: AI Emphasis Added to University Degree
C1.body: The University of Arizona's College of Information Science has inaugurated a novel emphasis on artificial intelligence within its undergraduate degree program, slated to commence in Fall 2026. This innovative initiative seeks to synergistically combine technical proficiency with a nuanced understanding of ethics and societal implications, thereby fostering a holistic approach to AI education. Through the AI Core program, students will have the opportunity to engage with real-world projects, navigating the complexities of AI development while concurrently examining its far-reaching consequences on society. By integrating these disparate yet complementary facets, the university aims to cultivate a cohort of adept professionals capable of navigating the multifaceted landscape of AI. This strategic maneuver is poised to have a profound impact on the field, as it underscores the imperative of responsible AI development. The program's emphasis on ethics and societal impact will enable students to develop a sophisticated understanding of AI's role in shaping our world. Furthermore, the university's commitment to fostering a culture of innovation and collaboration will provide students with a unique learning experience, one that will equip them with the skills and knowledge necessary to excel in this rapidly evolving field.

articles.original_title: US flags DeepSeek, Chinese firms over AI theft allegations

A2.title: US Flags Chinese Firms
A2.body: The US is looking at Chinese firms. They think they stole AI. This is a big problem. The US is not happy. They want to stop this. It is about AI theft.

B1.title: US Accuses China Firms
B1.body: The US has accused some Chinese companies of stealing AI technology. This happened recently and involves a company called DeepSeek. The US government is taking action because it thinks these companies have done something wrong. The companies are accused of taking AI technology without permission. This is a big issue because AI technology is very important and valuable. The US wants to protect its technology and stop other countries from taking it. This case is important because it shows the US is serious about protecting its technology. The US government will now investigate the companies and take further action if needed. This will help keep technology safe.

B2.title: US Flags Chinese Firms
B2.body: The US has flagged several Chinese firms, including DeepSeek, over allegations of AI theft. This move is part of a broader effort to protect American intellectual property. The allegations suggest that these firms have been involved in the theft of sensitive AI technology, which could have significant implications for national security. The US government has been cracking down on Chinese companies accused of stealing American technology. The issue has been a major point of contention between the two countries, with the US imposing sanctions on several Chinese firms. The allegations against DeepSeek and other Chinese firms are likely to further strain relations between the US and China. The US is taking a tough stance on intellectual property theft, and this move is seen as a warning to other companies. The incident highlights the need for companies to protect their intellectual property. The US government is taking steps to prevent further theft.

C1.title: US Alleges AI Theft
C1.body: The United States has recently flagged DeepSeek, a Chinese firm, alongside other Chinese companies, over allegations of artificial intelligence theft. This development has significant implications, as it underscores the escalating tensions between the two nations regarding intellectual property rights and technological advancements. The US authorities have been scrutinizing Chinese firms, citing concerns over the purported misappropriation of sensitive AI technology. The allegations suggest that these firms have been engaging in clandestine activities, surreptitiously acquiring and exploiting American innovation for their own benefit. The situation is fraught with complexity, as it involves not only economic interests but also geopolitical dynamics. The US government's stance on this matter is likely to have far-reaching consequences, potentially influencing the trajectory of global technological progress. As the world grapples with the challenges posed by AI, the need for stringent regulations and international cooperation becomes increasingly evident. The US's actions may precipitate a paradigm shift in the way nations approach AI development and ownership. The repercussions of these allegations will undoubtedly be closely monitored by the international community, as they may have a profound impact on the future of global technological collaboration.

articles.original_title: I stopped initiating — no calls, no texts, no suggesting plans — just to see who would notice. Three months later I had my answer, and the silence told me everything I’d been afraid to know.

A2.title: No Calls, No Texts
A2.body: A person stopped calling friends. They wanted to see who would notice. They lived in Saigon and Singapore. Friends were in Melbourne. The person was tired. They waited three months for an answer.

B1.title: Testing Friendships
B1.body: A person stopped calling and texting friends to see who would notice. They lived in Saigon and Singapore, but had friends in Melbourne. The distance made it hard to stay in touch. After three months, the person got their answer. The silence showed them who really cared. This was not a test, but a result of feeling exhausted. The person wanted to know if friends would reach out. The experience taught them a lot about their friendships and who was truly invested. It was a difficult but valuable lesson. The person learned to appreciate the friends who did notice and care.

B2.title: Testing Friendships
B2.body: A person living between Saigon and Singapore conducted an unintentional social experiment. They stopped initiating contact with friends in Melbourne, including calls, texts, and plan suggestions, due to exhaustion from maintaining long-distance friendships. This decision was made to see who would notice their absence. After three months, the silence was deafening, revealing who truly valued their relationship. The experience was not a calculated test, but rather a result of feeling drained from trying to keep friendships alive despite physical distance and poor internet connectivity. The outcome was telling, and the silence spoke volumes about the state of their friendships. This experiment was a hard lesson, but it showed that true friends will make an effort to stay in touch, regardless of distance or circumstances. The person learned a valuable lesson about friendships and communication. It was a difficult but important realization.

C1.title: Initiation Silence Reveals Truth
C1.body: A period of deliberate inaction was undertaken to gauge the responsiveness of acquaintances, wherein no attempts were made to establish communication, be it through telephone calls, text messages, or proposals for social engagements. This abstention, which lasted for three months, yielded a revelatory outcome, with the ensuing silence serving as a poignant indicator of the true nature of these relationships. The decision to adopt this passive stance was precipitated by a state of emotional exhaustion, stemming from the challenges of maintaining friendships across disparate geographical locations, including Saigon, Singapore, and Melbourne. The confluence of temporal and spatial distances had already begun to erode the foundations of these relationships, rendering them increasingly tenuous. The silence that ensued was a stark testament to the ephemeral nature of these connections, laying bare the realities that had been obscured by a mixture of nostalgia and obligation. Ultimately, this experiment, though unpremeditated, yielded a profound insight into the human propensity for attachment and the impermanence of interpersonal bonds.

articles.original_title: Light-controlled artificial muscles: Researchers develop shape-shifting materials

A2.title: New Shape Materials
A2.body: A team makes new materials. They are smart and can change shape. This is new tech. It is useful. The team works hard.

B1.title: New Shape-Shifting Materials
B1.body: A research team has made new materials that can change shape. They are linking small motors into 3D structures to create intelligent materials. This is a big step in making the next generation of programmable materials. The team is working hard to develop these materials. They want to use them in the future. The new materials will be very useful. They can be used in many areas. The research is important and it matters. The team is making good progress. They are creating materials that can change shape and do different things. This is a new and exciting area of research.

B2.title: Shape-Shifting Materials Developed
B2.body: A team of researchers has made a significant breakthrough in developing shape-shifting materials. By linking tiny motors at the atomic scale into complex 3D structures, they have created the next generation of intelligent materials. These materials have the potential to be programmed, allowing them to change shape in response to various stimuli. This innovative technology could have a major impact on various fields, including robotics and medicine. The researchers' work is a crucial step forward in creating materials that can adapt and respond to their environment. As technology continues to advance, these shape-shifting materials are likely to play a key role in shaping the future. With potential applications in numerous industries, this development is an exciting example of how science can lead to innovative solutions. The team's findings are a significant milestone in the development of programmable materials.

C1.title: Breakthrough Shape-Shifting Materials
C1.body: A pioneering research team has successfully harnessed the potential of atomic-scale motors, integrating them into complex 3D structures to devise the next generation of programmable, intelligent materials. This innovative endeavour has far-reaching implications, as these shape-shifting materials can be precisely controlled and manipulated, thereby facilitating the creation of novel, adaptive systems. By leveraging the unique properties of these materials, researchers can develop sophisticated, responsive technologies that can be tailored to specific applications. The integration of atomic-scale motors into 3D structures enables the creation of materials that can alter their shape, properties, and functionality in response to various stimuli, including light. This groundbreaking achievement has the potential to revolutionize numerous fields, from robotics and medicine to aerospace and energy. As researchers continue to refine and expand this technology, we can expect to see the emergence of new, innovative products and systems that can adapt and respond to changing conditions. The development of these intelligent materials is a significant step forward, and their potential applications are vast and varied, with the possibility of transforming various aspects of our lives.

articles.original_title: Inter to part ways with Frattesi as Napoli & Roma express interest

A2.title: Inter to Leave Frattesi
A2.body: Inter Milan will leave Davide Frattesi. Napoli and Roma want him. He is a midfielder. They want to sign him. Inter will let him go. This summer it will happen.

B1.title: Inter to Leave Frattesi
B1.body: Inter Milan will likely let Davide Frattesi go this summer. Napoli and AS Roma are interested in the midfielder. Frattesi plays for Inter now, but he may join another team soon. This decision is important because Frattesi is a good player. Inter Milan needs to make room for new players. Napoli and AS Roma want to sign Frattesi because he can help their teams. The transfer will happen this summer, and it will be interesting to see where Frattesi goes. He is a young and talented player, and many teams want him. Inter Milan has to make a decision about Frattesi's future now.

B2.title: Inter to Release Midfielder
B2.body: Inter Milan is expected to let go of Davide Frattesi this summer. Several clubs, including Napoli and AS Roma, have expressed interest in signing the midfielder. This decision comes as no surprise, given the intense competition for spots on the team. Frattesi's potential transfer has been a topic of discussion for some time now. The midfielder's skills and experience make him an attractive candidate for other teams. As the summer transfer window approaches, it will be interesting to see where Frattesi ends up. Both Napoli and AS Roma are strong contenders, and it's likely that one of them will secure his services. The transfer will undoubtedly have an impact on the teams involved, and fans are eagerly awaiting the outcome. With several top clubs vying for his attention, Frattesi's future looks promising. His next move will be closely watched by football enthusiasts.

C1.title: Inter Milan to Release Frattesi
C1.body: Inter Milan is poised to relinquish Davide Frattesi, a midfielder, at the culmination of the current season, with several prominent Italian clubs, notably Napoli and AS Roma, evincing a keen interest in acquiring his services. This development is precipitated by Frattesi's burgeoning reputation as a skilled and versatile player, whose prowess on the field has garnered considerable attention from various stakeholders within the football fraternity. The impending departure of Frattesi from Inter Milan is likely to precipitate a flurry of activity in the transfer market, as several clubs seek to bolster their midfield with a player of his caliber. The interest exhibited by Napoli and AS Roma is a testament to Frattesi's burgeoning talent, and it remains to be seen which club will ultimately secure his signature. This move is anticipated to have significant implications for the future of Inter Milan, as the club seeks to reconfigure its squad and navigate the complexities of the transfer market. The decision to part ways with Frattesi is a calculated one, driven by the club's strategic objectives and its desire to optimize its midfield dynamics.

articles.original_title: Updates on Arsenal duo’s injuries in win over Newcastle

A2.title: Arsenal Wins Over Newcastle
A2.body: Arsenal beat Newcastle. Kai Havertz and Ebere Eze got hurt. They scored one goal. Eze scored it. Arsenal is now top. The hurt players will be okay.

B1.title: Arsenal Win Over Newcastle
B1.body: Mikel Arteta says Arsenal's win over Newcastle was good. Kai Havertz and Ebere Eze got injured during the game. Eze scored the only goal, helping Arsenal become top again. The injuries do not seem too bad, says Arteta. The team is happy to be back on top. Eze's goal was important for the win. Arteta is waiting to see how bad the injuries are. The team will check Havertz and Eze soon. They hope the players can play again soon. This win is important for Arsenal's season. The team is working hard to stay on top. Arteta is pleased with the team's performance.

B2.title: Arsenal Win Over Newcastle
B2.body: Mikel Arteta has provided an update on the injuries sustained by Kai Havertz and Ebere Eze during Arsenal's win over Newcastle. Fortunately, the issues do not appear to be too severe. Eze scored the decisive goal, securing a vital win for Arsenal and sending them back to the top of the league. The victory was a significant one, as it allowed Arsenal to regain their position at the summit. Arteta will be relieved that the injuries are not too bad, as both players are crucial to the team's success. The win over Newcastle was a testament to the team's resilience and determination. Eze's goal was a highlight of the match, and his contribution was instrumental in securing the win. With the injuries not being too serious, Arsenal can now focus on their upcoming fixtures.

C1.title: Arsenal Duo's Injuries Assessed
C1.body: In the aftermath of Arsenal's slender victory over Newcastle, manager Mikel Arteta has provided a cautiously optimistic assessment of the injuries sustained by Kai Havertz and Ebere Eze. The duo's premature departures from the game sparked concern amongst the Arsenal faithful, but Arteta's remarks suggest that the issues may not be as severe as initially feared. Eze, who scored the decisive goal, and Havertz, were both forced to exit the match, prompting worries about their potential absence from upcoming fixtures. However, Arteta's measured tone implies that the club's medical staff do not anticipate prolonged layoffs for either player. This development is particularly significant, given Arsenal's ongoing pursuit of silverware and their reliance on a strong squad to navigate a congested fixture list. As the season enters its critical phase, the fitness of key players will be paramount, and Arteta's update will be welcomed by fans eager to see their team succeed. The victory over Newcastle has propelled Arsenal back to the top of the table, and a fully fit squad will be essential in maintaining this momentum.

articles.original_title: Costco Stopped Selling Xbox – But These Consoles Survived

A2.title: Xbox Gone from Costco
A2.body: Costco stopped selling Xbox. Xbox games are gone too. Other consoles are still available. They are on the shelves. People can buy them. Costco made this change.

B1.title: Xbox Disappears from Costco
B1.body: The Xbox console has disappeared from Costco's shelves. This also includes Xbox accessories and games. However, other brand consoles are still available. This change happened recently. Costco is a big store where people buy many things. The reason for this change is not clear. Other consoles from different brands are still for sale. People can still buy them at Costco. The store has many other gaming options. This change might affect Xbox sales. It is not known when Xbox will be back on the shelves. People who want Xbox must look elsewhere now. Costco has many other products to offer.

B2.title: Xbox Disappears from Costco
B2.body: Recently, it has been noticed that Xbox consoles have disappeared from Costco's shelves. This disappearance also includes Xbox accessories and games. However, consoles from other brands are still available for purchase. The reason behind this move is not clear, but it is likely a business decision. Costco is a major retailer, and its actions can have a significant impact on the gaming industry. The absence of Xbox consoles may affect sales, but other brands are likely to benefit from this situation. As a result, gamers may need to look elsewhere to purchase Xbox products. This change could be an opportunity for other retailers to fill the gap. The gaming industry is highly competitive, and companies must adapt to changes in the market. Xbox consoles were popular among gamers, and their disappearance from Costco may lead to a shift in consumer behavior.

C1.title: Xbox Disappears from Costco Shelves
C1.body: In a notable development, the Xbox console has seemingly vanished from Costco's inventory, with its accompanying accessories and games also being absent. Conversely, consoles from other prominent brands continue to be readily available, suggesting that this disappearance is not a result of a broader policy shift. This phenomenon has sparked intrigue, as the reasons behind this decision remain unclear. The absence of Xbox products from Costco's shelves may have significant implications for the gaming industry, potentially influencing consumer preferences and purchasing decisions. Notably, this development has not affected the availability of other gaming consoles, which continue to be stocked by the retailer. The disappearance of Xbox from Costco's shelves is a noteworthy occurrence, warranting attention from industry observers and enthusiasts alike, as it may signal a strategic reorientation in the retail landscape. Furthermore, this incident underscores the dynamic nature of the gaming industry, where market trends and consumer demand can fluctuate rapidly. Ultimately, the reasons behind this decision will likely be scrutinized, as stakeholders seek to understand the underlying motivations and potential consequences.

articles.original_title: Jamie Lynn Spears Reflects on Daughter Maddie's High School Graduation

A2.title: Jamie Lynn Happy
A2.body: Jamie Lynn Spears is happy. Her daughter Maddie is 17. Maddie is finishing high school. Jamie is proud of her. She is talking about it. Jamie loves her daughter.

B1.title: Jamie Lynn Spears Daughter Graduates
B1.body: Jamie Lynn Spears is very proud of her daughter Maddie. Maddie is graduating from high school at 17 years old. Jamie Lynn thinks about the time she spent raising Maddie. She remembers when Maddie was a little girl. Now Maddie is a young woman. Jamie Lynn is happy and sad at the same time. She is happy because Maddie is growing up, but sad because she will miss her little girl. Jamie Lynn is teaching people about being a good mother. She is showing them how to raise their children. Jamie Lynn's daughter is very lucky to have a mother like her. Jamie Lynn loves her daughter very much.

B2.title: Jamie Lynn Spears Proud
B2.body: Jamie Lynn Spears is preparing for a major milestone in her life as a mother. Her daughter, Maddie Watson, is about to graduate from high school. As the big day approaches, Jamie Lynn is taking a moment to reflect on the experience of raising her 17-year-old. She recently shared her thoughts on social media, expressing her pride and possibly a bit of nostalgia. The graduation is a significant event for the family, marking an important transition in Maddie's life. Jamie Lynn's fans are likely to be interested in her thoughts on motherhood and how she has balanced her career and family life. The former Zoey 101 star has been open about her experiences as a mother, and her reflections on Maddie's graduation are likely to resonate with many parents. Jamie Lynn's daughter is growing up and moving forward, and her mother is proud of the person she has become.

C1.title: Jamie Lynn Spears Reflects
C1.body: As Jamie Lynn Spears' daughter, Maddie Watson, approaches her high school graduation, the erstwhile Zoey 101 star has been introspectively pondering the ephemeral nature of childhood. The impending milestone has prompted Spears to ruminate on the complexities of motherhood, precipitating a myriad of emotions. Notwithstanding the challenges inherent to raising a teenager, Spears has ostensibly navigated the travails of parenthood with aplomb, instilling in Maddie the requisite values and principles to thrive in an increasingly nuanced world. The graduation ceremony, a seminal event in Maddie's life, serves as a poignant reminder of the transience of adolescence, underscoring the importance of cherishing fleeting moments. As Spears contemplates her daughter's forthcoming transition to adulthood, she is compelled to reconcile the dichotomy between maternal pride and the melancholy of relinquishing childhood. This poignant occasion has afforded Spears an opportunity to introspectively evaluate her parenting style, acknowledging the myriad sacrifices and triumphs that have contributed to Maddie's growth. The experience has been a defining aspect of Spears' life, one that will undoubtedly continue to shape her perspective on motherhood.
